5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (lib/createObjects.js). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.

8915.issue: [W8915] Dependabot npm entry (directory: "/") has no "cooldown" configured. A cooldown of at least 7 days (e.g. "cooldown: { default: 7 }") is recommended to reduce supply chain risk.
